name: Ventia Services Group Limited
analysis: VNT's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$6.3500. Trade idea: entry A$6.6500, stop A$5.9895, target A$8.6315 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
